name: Blanchard Park
description: Blanchard Park is a place to play pickleball in Martinez, GA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Blanchard Park Pickleball
description: Blanchard Park Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Martinez, GA. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Crawford Creek
description: Come play pickleball at Crawford Creek in Evans, GA! There are 2 outdoor courts. The court lines are permanent. Players have access to lights. The courts are private.

name: Greenbrier Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Greenbrier Middle School in Evans, GA! There are 4 wood and concrete courts. 1 is outdoors and 3 are indoors. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Harlem High School
description: Come play pickleball at Harlem High School in Harlem, GA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private.

name: Lakeside Park
description: Lakeside Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Martinez, GA. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Patriots Park
description: Patriots Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grovetown, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Windmill Plantation
description: Windmill Plantation is a place to play pickleball in Evans, GA. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights.
